task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct Jitsi Meet room URL.
Set the user's display name to 'Maria Interpreter'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Maria Interpreter' is visible on the user's video tile, in the participant list, or on the pre-join screen.

The main Jitsi Meet interface is visible with standard meeting controls (e.g., microphone, camera, and leave meeting buttons), indicating the user is inside the room and not just on the pre-join screen.
A raised hand icon is clearly visible on the user's video tile or next to 'Maria Interpreter' in the participant list.

task_completion.description: Keep the Speaker Stats panel open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A panel or modal window titled exactly 'Speaker Stats' is open and visible on the screen.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a real web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard web browser UI elements (tabs, address bar) are visible, rather than a terminal window or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Jitsi Meet application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Jitsi Meet graphical user interface being rendered, not a plain text document or a mocked-up HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is closed, ensuring the text 'Speaker Stats' and 'Maria Interpreter' were not artificially injected into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct meeting URL is 'http://localhost:8080/InterpreterSession2024'. The expected display name is 'Maria Interpreter'. The official UI label for the statistics panel is exactly 'Speaker Stats' (not 'Speaker Statistics').
